title: Proclamation No. 2011, s. 2010
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 2011

EXCLUDING FROM PROCLAMATION NO. 1875, SERIES OF 1979, PORTIONS DESCRIBED AS LOTS 6 AND 7 AND RESERVING IT FOR MILITARY PURPOSES, AND EXCLUDING FROM PROCLAMATION NO. 2405, SERIES OF 1985, PORTION OF LOT 1 AND DECLARING SUCH AS PART OF THE BAGONG LIPUNAN SITES

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources, to resolve the overlapping of properties contained in Proclamation Nos. 1875 and 2405, dated July 25, 1979 and March 22, 1985, respectively, and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I , GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Republic of the Philippines, do hereby proclaim:

The exclusion from the operation of Proclamation No. 2405, dated March 22, 1985, entitled “Reserving for military purposes certain parcels of land of the public domain situated in Fort Gregorio del Pilar, City of Baguio, Island of Luzon”, a certain portion of Lot 1 (13.4857 hectares) embraced therein and declaring the same included as part of Proclamation No. 1875, dated July 25, 1979, entitled “Declaring as Bagong Lipunan Sites Certain Parcels of Land of the Public Domain Situated in the City of Baguio, Island of Luzon”, subject to private rights, if any there be, and further, which portion of land, NOW Lot 8 covered by TCT No. 40531, registered in the name of Republic of the Philippines, is more particularly described as follows:

X X X on the N., along lines 29-30-31 by Lot 7; along lines 31-32-33-34-35-36 by Lot 1; along lines 36-37-38-39-40-41-42 by Lot 2; along lines 42-1 by Lot 3, all of Pad-CAR-000805. Beginning at a point marked “1” S. 62 deg., 38′ E., 2609.34 m. from triangulation station “BOYD”;

thence S. 14 deg., 26′ E., 50.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 59 deg., 57′ W., 14.58 m. to point 3; thence S. 75 deg., 49′ W., 45.52 m. to point 4; thence S. 38 deg., 23′ W., 7.42 m. to point 5; thence S. 0 deg., 01′ W., 25.47 m. to point 6; thence S. 22 deg., 46′ E., 66.15 m. to point 7; thence DUE SOUTH 63.50 m. to point 8; thence S. 32 deg., 38′ E., 9.61 m. to point 9; thence S. 48 deg., 31′ E., 7.01 m. to point 10; thence S. 12 deg., 35′ E., 8.85 m. to point 11; thence S. 8 deg., 03′ W., 8.07 m. to point 12; thence S. 40 deg., 01′ W., 10.75 m. to point 13; thence S. 45 deg., 08′ W., 8.29 m. to point 14; thence S. 53 deg., 48′ W., 9.33 m. to point 15; thence S. 50 deg., 27′ W., 8.18 m. to point 16; thence S. 62 deg., 00′ W., 9.50 m. to point 17; thence S. 73 deg., 72′ W., 21.35 m. to point 18; thence DUE WEST 8.31 m. to point 19; thence N. 69 deg., 40′ W., 9.67 m. to point 20; thence N. 69 deg., 59′ W., 22.50 m. to point 21; thence N. 69 deg., 58’W., 34.00 m. to point 22; thence S. 1 deg., 04′ E., 100.71 m. to point 23; thence N. 89 deg., 09′ E., 101.12 m. to point 24; thence N. 72 deg., 05′ E., 152.51 m. to point 25; thence S. 27 deg., 16′ E., 167.94 m. to point 26; thence S. 84 deg., 40′ W., 192.63 m. to point 27; thence N. 67 deg., 05′ W., 255.47 m. to point 28; thence N. 9 deg., 26′ W., 264.80 m. to point 29; thence S. 59 deg., 25′ E., 175.03 m. to point 30; thence N. 8 deg., 56′ W., 28.53 m. to point 31; thence N. 70 deg., 46′ E., 73.84 m. to point 32; thence N. 24 deg., 54′ E., 24.28 m. to point 33; thence N. 32 deg., 05′ W., 14.57 m. to point 34; thence N. 16 deg., 22′ W., 19.40 m. to point 35; thence N. 17 deg., 30′ E., 17.11 m. to point 36; thence N. 78 deg., 46′ E., 37.26 m. to point 37; thence N. 37 deg., 57′ E., 38.52 m. to point 38; thence N. 78 deg., 28′ E., 21.94 m. to point 39; thence N. 29 deg., 05′ E., 23.97 m. to point 40; thence N. 81 deg., 47′ E., 42.28 m. to point 41; thence N. 75 deg., 35′ E., 61.30 m. to point 42; thence N. 75 deg., 35′ E., 25.40 m. to point of

beginning containing an area of ONE HUNDRED THIRTY FOUR THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED FIFTY SEVEN (134,857) square meters more or less.

In the same vein, I do hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation No. 1875, dated July 25, 1979, entitled “Declaring as Bagong Lipunan Sites certain Parcels of Land of the Public Domain Situated in the City of Baguio, Island of Luzon”, Lot 6, covered by TCT No. T-40529, and Lot 7, covered by TCT No. T-40530, and declaring them included as part of Proclamation No. 2405, dated March 22, 1985, entitled “Reserving for military purposes certain parcels of land of the public domain situated in Fort Gregorio del Pilar, City of Baguio, Island of Luzon”. Containing an area of NINETY THOUSAND (90,000) square meters and FOURTY * THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED FIFTY FOUR (40,354) square meters , more or less, respectively particularly described as follows:

Lot 6

From triangulation station “BOYD”, Baguio Townsite;

thence S. 38 deg., 39′ W., 286.91 m. to point 2; thence S. 1 deg., 51′ W., 200.53 m. to point 3; thence S. 8 deg., 53′ W., 361.02 m. to point 4; thence N. 17 deg., 12′ W., 246.88 m. to point 5; thence N. 12 deg., 56′ W., 140.29 m. to point 6; thence N. 6 deg., 25′ W., 219.84 m. to point 7; thence N. 64 deg., 56′ E., 219.82 m. to point 8; thence N. 60 deg., 45′ E., 196.64 m. to point of beginning containing an area of NINETY THOUSAND (90,000) square meters more or less.

Lot 7

From triangulation station “BOYD”, Baguio Townsite;

thence S. 13 deg., 31′ E., 202.96 m. to point 2; thence S. 16 deg., 54′ W., 169.99 m. to point 3; thence S. 17 deg., 14′ W., 19.03 m. to point 4; thence S. 55 deg., 13′ E., 19.63 m. to point 5; thence N. 86 deg., 49′ E., 15.83 m. to point 6; thence S. 37 deg., 22′ E., 28.14 m. to point 7; thence S. 61 deg., 10′ E., 40.09 m. to point 8; thence S. 74 deg., 19′ E., 44.33 m. to point 9; thence S. 28 deg., 18′ E., 12.11 m. to point 10; thence S. 8 deg., 32′ W., 12.41 m. to point 11; thence S. 74 deg., 17′ W., 78.99 m. to point 12; thence S. 7 deg., 52′ E., 5.19 m. to point 13; thence S. 53 deg., 19′ E., 24.20 m. to point 14; thence S. 42 deg., 00′ E., 34.50 m. to point 15; thence S. 15 deg., 54′ W., 25.47 m. to point 16; thence S. 8 deg., 44′ W., 49.07 m. to point 17; thence S. 30 deg., 26′ E., 14.61 m. to point 18; thence S. 8 deg., 56′ E., 28.59 m. to point 19; thence N. 59 deg., 25′ W., 175.05 m. to point 20; thence N. 8 deg., 53′ E., 361.02 m. to point 21; thence N. 1 deg., 51′ E., 200.53 m. to point of beginning containing an area of FORTY THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED FIFTY FOUR (40,354) square meters or less.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done, in the City of Manila, this 1st day of March in the year of our Lord, Two Thousand and Ten.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
